title: delegation — helper functions
description: Small helper facade over the DelegationResolver + the impersonation session lookup. Consumers rarely need direct access — the traits (HasDelegations + HasImpersonationHistory) cover the common cases — but these helpers exist for one-off checks in blade views, notification composers, and console commands.

helpers.purpose: Returns the collection of active delegations where $delegator is currently delegating (as delegator). Optional role/tenant/application filters. Reads through the DelegationResolver LRU cache.
Returns the collection of active delegations where $user is currently the delegate. This is the primary read for 'am I currently acting on someone's behalf'.
Returns true when the current request is served with an impersonation-scoped PAT (checked by inspecting the request context flag set by the enforce_active_session middleware).
Returns the current impersonation session (or null when not impersonating). Reads from the request context (set by the middleware); does NOT re-hit the DB.
Returns the effective state string ('pending' | 'active' | 'expired' | 'revoked') derived from starts_at + ends_at + revoked_at. Used by SDUI status chips + notification templates.
